mapper.select: SELECT symbol FROM stock_symbol WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY last_collected_at IS NULL DESC, last_collected_at, symbol LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_symbol (symbol, name, exchange, currency, active, collect_tier, first_seen_at, last_seen_at) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{name}, #{exchange}, #{currency}, TRUE, #{collectTier}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), exchange = VALUES(exchange), currency = VALUES(currency), active = TRUE, collect_tier = VALUES(collect_tier), last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
